login.welcome_title: Welcome to the Unified <highlight>{citizen}</highlight> Authentication Platform
login.welcome_subtitle: Log in or register with a single username and password to access all available government services.
login.welcome_body: An easy and convenient way to identify yourself and access State services from your computer or mobile device without visiting government offices.
login.card_subtitle: You can log in with your national ID "Cédula" or registered email address
login.register_cta: Register and access Dominican State services with a single username and password, securely and reliably
login.recovery_subtitle: To reset your password, enter your registered email address

identification.intro: You can continue with registration by providing your "Cédula" identity number.
identification.id_invalid_length: The national ID must contain 11 digits

verification.intro: Next, we will validate your identity using facial verification and a liveness check. Make sure you meet the following conditions:

requirements.device: Use a device with a built-in front-facing camera.
requirements.face: Allow us to capture images of your face.
requirements.photosensitive: This verification displays colored lights. Be careful if you are photosensitive.

modal.title: Biometric verification
modal.description: Please look directly at the camera and keep your face inside the oval.

account.intro: To finish and complete your registration, fill in the following fields.
account.success_description: Your citizen account has been created.
account.error: There was an error completing the registration. Please try again.

validation.password_min: The password must be at least 8 characters long
validation.password_uppercase: It must contain at least one uppercase letter
validation.password_lowercase: It must contain at least one lowercase letter
validation.password_number: It must contain at least one number
validation.email_mismatch: The email addresses do not match

about.title: About your Cuenta Única Ciudadana
about.subtitle: The official government platform designed for you to interact with the State centrally, securely, and efficiently from anywhere.
about.video_desc: Discover in this video how to use all the tools at your disposal once you log in.

support.title: Support and Contact
support.subtitle: Do you have any doubts or need help with your Cuenta Única Ciudadana? We are here to help you and ensure your experience is fast and secure.

q1.q: How do I log into my Cuenta Única Ciudadana?
q1.a: To log into your Cuenta Única Ciudadana, go to the login page and enter your national ID or registered email address along with your password. If it is your first time, you must create an account first.

q2.q: I forgot my password, how do I recover it?
q2.a: Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit, sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua.

q3.q: What services can I access with my Cuenta Única?
q3.a: With your Cuenta Unica Ciudadana you can access all the digital services of the Dominican government, including status inquiries, identity verification, and access to the portals of government institutions.

q4.q: How do I update my personal data?
q4.a: You can update your personal data by accessing the 'Personal Data' section in your user panel. There you can modify your contact information, address and other relevant data.

q5.q: Is my information safe on the platform?
q5.a: Yes, your information is protected with the highest security standards. We use data encryption and advanced protection measures to guarantee the privacy and security of your personal information.

contact.office_value: Av. Rómulo Betancourt #311, corporate building vista 311, Santo Domingo, D.N.

n1.title: Security update
n1.message: Your account security policy has been updated. Review the changes in the privacy section.

n2.title: Verification completed
n2.message: Your two-factor authentication has been successfully configured.

n3.title: Security review
n3.message: We recommend reviewing the devices connected to your account periodically.

n4.title: Suspicious login attempt
n4.message: A login attempt was detected from an unrecognized location. If it wasn't you, change your password.

n5.title: New feature available
n5.message: You can now use passkeys to access your account without a password. Set it up in security settings.

profile.official_records_note: The information shown comes from official records (JCE, TSS, DGII) and is synchronized with the system. To modify your data, you must go to the corresponding offices of the Central Electoral Board.

assistant.title: Virtual assistant
assistant.welcome_message: Hi! I'm your Cuenta Unica Ciudadana virtual assistant. I'm here to help with any questions about the platform, your account security, or how to use our services. How can I help you today?
assistant.response_password: To change your password, go to 'Privacy and security' in the side menu and select 'Change password'. We recommend using a secure password with at least 8 characters, including uppercase, lowercase, and numbers.
assistant.response_2fa: Two-factor authentication adds an extra layer of security to your account. You can configure it in 'Privacy and security' > 'Multifactor authentication'. You can choose email, SMS, or an authentication app.
assistant.response_passkey: Passkeys let you sign in without a password using your fingerprint, Face ID, or your device PIN. To configure them, go to 'Privacy and security' > 'Passkey creation and management'. It's more secure and convenient than traditional passwords.
assistant.response_services: With your Cuenta Unica you can access all digital government services. Each institution has its own services available through portals linked to your account.
assistant.response_identity: You can use your ID number to sign in to the platform. Your ID is your main identifier to access State services.
assistant.response_profile: Your personal data is available in the 'Personal data' section of the menu. There you can view your registered information. To update official data like name or birth date, you must visit the corresponding offices.
assistant.response_security: Your security is our priority. We use data encryption, multifactor authentication, and access monitoring. In 'Privacy and security' you can review connected devices, change passwords, and configure additional protection measures.
assistant.response_devices: In 'Activity history' you can see all devices from which your account has been accessed. If you detect suspicious access, you can unlink devices and change your password immediately.
assistant.response_support: For additional support you can: 1) Call (809)-123-4567, 2) Email soporte@cuentaciudadana.gob.do, 3) Visit the 'Support and help' section in the menu, or 4) check the FAQs.
assistant.response_greeting: Hello! It's great to greet you. I'm here to help with any question about your Cuenta Unica Ciudadana. Is there anything specific I can help you with?
assistant.response_thanks: You're welcome! It's a pleasure to help. If you have more questions about your Cuenta Unica Ciudadana, feel free to ask. I'm here to make your experience easier and safer.
assistant.response_default: I understand your request. I recommend checking the side menu sections to find the information you need, or you can contact our technical support at (809)-123-4567 or soporte@cuentaciudadana.gob.do for personalized assistance. Is there anything more specific I can help you with?
assistant.response_error: Sorry, there was an error processing your message. Please try again or contact technical support.
